drivetrain.notes: The official BMW 10/2011 M5 technical-data PDF confirms the exact F10 M5 launch-state is rear-wheel drive.

transmission.notes: Contradicted placeholder. The official BMW 10/2011 M5 technical-data PDF publishes a seven-speed M double-clutch transmission with Drivelogic rather than ZF8HP, so this represented automatic row is not a valid exact production state under its current transmission id.
transmission.name: 8-speed automatic (ZF 8HP)
